title: BREAST CANCER PEER SUPPORT NETWORK AND RESOURCES - 211info
text: BREAST FRIENDS BREAST CANCER PEER SUPPORT NETWORK AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one support through diagnosis, treatment, and beyond. Manages a volunteer match program for individuals needing additional support. Hats, wigs, prostheses, and bras are available for chemotherapy-related hair loss and post-mastectomy needs. In-person and phone support available. Offers workshops, retreats, and support groups. 11481 SW Hall Boulevard Suite 105 Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Newly-diagnosed breast cancer patients Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday by appointment Email (503) 598-8048 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 598-8048 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None for general support. Some workshops and retreats charge a fee; scholarships available on a case-by-case basis. Hats, wigs, and prosthesis with bras are free for chemotherapy patients with hair loss and those who have undergone a mastectomy. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for scholarships LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm Services: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Breast Cancer Mastectomy Products Peer Counseling * Breast Cancer Prosthetics/Orthotics/Seating * Breast Cancer If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BREAST FRIENDS
